story.iWant: detailed information about a space when I hover
story.soThat: I can quickly see who's in a space and what's happening before I join

tasks.task: SpaceDetailPanel Component - Main container with glass-morphism, 200ms animation
ParticipantRoster Sub-Component - Full user list with status indicators
AgendaPhaseDisplay Sub-Component - Phase tracker pill with progress
ActivityLogPreview Sub-Component - Last 3-5 log entries, monospace font
TranscriptSnippet Sub-Component - Message preview with speaker attribution
Integrate Hover Panel into ModernSpaceCard - Hover state, click-stop protocol
Mobile Bottom Sheet Implementation - Tap-to-expand pattern
Data Fetching Hook (useSpaceDetails) - Lazy load agenda, log, transcript
Accessibility Implementation - aria-expanded, keyboard support, focus trap
Theme Testing - All 4 themes (neon, zen, obsidian, paper)

criterion.title: Hover Reveals Expanded Details
criterion.requirement: Hover on ModernSpaceCard shows expanded details panel
Panel overlays card content with additional information
Shows: full participant roster, agenda phase, activity log, transcript snippet
Smooth expand/collapse animation (200ms)

criterion.title: Full Participant Roster Display
criterion.requirement: Displays all participants (not limited to 4 like card view)
Each participant shows: avatar, name, role, status (speaking/listening/observing)
Uses existing AvatarGroup or creates ParticipantRoster component
Scrollable if more than 8 participants

criterion.title: Agenda Phase Display
criterion.requirement: Shows current meeting phase/agenda item if available
Phase tracker pill showing progress (e.g., "Phase 2 of 4")
Uses space.metadata.agenda if available, gracefully handles absence

criterion.title: Activity Log Preview
criterion.requirement: Shows last 3-5 activity log entries
Each entry: timestamp, author, summary chip
Uses monospace font (JetBrains Mono/font-mono) per UX spec

criterion.title: Transcript Snippet
criterion.requirement: Shows last transcript snippet (latest message or meeting note)
Preview text truncated to 2-3 lines with ellipsis
Timestamp and speaker attribution

criterion.title: Primary Action Button
criterion.requirement: Join button prominent at bottom
Leave shown if user is in space
Knock option if space is private/locked
Button styled per theme with hover states

criterion.title: Click-Stop Protocol Compliance
criterion.requirement: Hover panel honors click-stop protocol (data-avatar-interactive)
Clicks inside panel don't trigger card navigation
Avatar clicks inside panel trigger onUserClick handler

criterion.title: Mobile Tap-to-Expand (Bottom Sheet Pattern)
criterion.requirement: Mobile: tap to expand shows details in bottom sheet modal
Bottom sheet slides up from bottom of screen
Close button and swipe-down to dismiss

criterion.title: Theme-Aware Styling
criterion.requirement: Hover panel uses glass-morphism effect consistent with NowBoard
Inherits CSS variables from theme system (Story 3.1)
Works correctly in all 4 themes (Neon, Zen, Obsidian, Paper)

criterion.title: Accessibility
criterion.requirement: Hover panel accessible via keyboard (focus shows panel)
aria-expanded attribute on card when panel visible
Panel content readable by screen readers
Focus trap within panel on mobile bottom sheet

doc.title: Epic Breakdown
doc.snippet: Shows: full participant roster, agenda phase, activity log, transcript snippet. Mobile: tap to expand shows details in bottom sheet modal.

doc.title: UX Design Specification
doc.snippet: SpaceCard hover reveal container; hover reveals must surface roster, agenda phase, activity log, and transcript snippet in consistent hierarchy.

doc.title: UX Design Specification
doc.snippet: Hover reveals: roster first, phase tracker second, log entries third, transcript preview last. All logs and transcripts stream to Supabase tables.

doc.title: UX Design Specification
doc.snippet: Mobile ≤1023px: Single-column feed of compact SpaceCards, bottom sheet reveals hover intel, bottom navigation surfaces quick join/delegate actions.

doc.title: Architecture Review
doc.snippet: Clean abstraction between data access and business logic. Interfaces in src/repositories/interfaces/, Supabase implementations in src/repositories/implementations/supabase/.

doc.title: Previous Story Reference
doc.snippet: NowBoard uses backdrop-blur: 12px, rgba() backgrounds. CSS tokens in src/styles/themes/tokens.css with theme-specific overrides using [data-theme="..."]

doc.title: Project Standards
doc.snippet: Mark interactive children with data-avatar-interactive. Parent guard: early-return if target closest('[data-avatar-interactive]'). Stop propagation on portal menus.

file.reason: Parent component to extend with hover panel integration. Contains click-stop protocol implementation to follow.
REUSE for participant roster display. Has status indicators (speaking/presenting/muted).
Individual avatar rendering with tooltips. Used by AvatarGroup.
Reference for glass-morphism styling pattern. Use same backdrop-blur and CSS token approach.
Reference for click-stop protocol with data-avatar-interactive and stopPropagation.
Add new SpaceDetailPanel exports here after creation.
REUSE for mobile bottom sheet implementation using Radix Dialog.
Add SpaceDetailPanel tokens here. Reference NowBoard tokens pattern.
Reference for message/transcript data fetching pattern.
Reference for lazy data fetching hook pattern.
Reference for aggregation hook pattern used in NowBoard.
Core types for space, user presence, and message data.
REUSE for user presence data (users, usersInSpaces).

node.usage: Timestamp formatting in activity log and transcript
Icons for action buttons, status indicators

constraint.rule: Components in src/components/floor-plan/modern/ directory
Follow Repository Pattern for any data fetching
Use server-side Supabase client in API routes, browser client in components
Click-Stop Protocol: Mark interactive children with data-avatar-interactive
Parent guard: early-return if target.closest('[data-avatar-interactive]')
Stop propagation on onPointerDown, onClick for portal menus
Use CSS variables from src/styles/themes/tokens.css
Glass-morphism: backdrop-blur, rgba() backgrounds per NowBoard pattern
Support all 4 themes with [data-theme="..."] selectors
Animation: 200ms ease-out for expand/collapse
WCAG 2.1 Level AA compliance
Keyboard navigable: focus on card shows panel
aria-expanded on card, role="region" on panel
Focus trap for mobile bottom sheet
Desktop (≥1440px): Hover reveals inline overlay panel
Tablet (1024-1439px): Hover reveals inline overlay panel
Mobile (<768px): Tap triggers bottom sheet modal
PascalCase for React components and their filenames
camelCase with use prefix for hooks (useSpaceDetails.ts)
kebab-case for CSS token names (--vo-detail-panel-*)
REUSE AvatarGroup for participant rendering
REUSE Dialog from shadcn/ui for bottom sheet
REUSE glass-morphism pattern from NowBoard
EXTEND ModernSpaceCard, do not duplicate

interface.name: SpaceDetailPanelProps
ActivityLogEntry
useSpaceDetails
ParticipantRosterProps
SpaceActionButtonsProps

tests.standards: Testing uses Vitest 3 with @testing-library/react for unit tests and Playwright for E2E. Test files go in __tests__/ directory at project root. Mock Supabase client for unit tests. Use happy-dom for fast DOM testing. Follow existing test patterns in __tests__/now-board.test.tsx and __tests__/attention-beacon.test.tsx.

ideas.idea: Test SpaceDetailPanel renders all sub-components (roster, agenda, log, transcript)
Test 200ms animation timing with CSS transition
Test ParticipantRoster displays all users without max limit
Test scroll appears with 8+ participants
Test user status indicators (speaking/presenting/muted)
Test AgendaPhaseDisplay shows correct phase and progress
Test graceful handling when no agenda data
Test ActivityLogPreview shows max 5 entries
Test monospace font class applied
Test TranscriptSnippet truncates to 3 lines
Test Join button shown when user not in space
Test Leave button shown when user in space
Test Knock button shown for private spaces
Test clicks inside panel don't propagate to card
Test data-avatar-interactive attribute present
Test bottom sheet opens on mobile viewport
Test close button dismisses bottom sheet
Test glass-morphism styles in all 4 themes
Test aria-expanded attribute on card
Test keyboard focus shows panel
Test focus trap in bottom sheet
